title: Spicy Pepper Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful Thai-inspired stir fry made with fresh peppers and solo.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 1 minced garlic clove and sauté for 1 minute.
Add sliced peppers and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
Add solo and stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
